title: React Summit 2025 (Upcoming)
description: Shayan will be speaking at React Summit 2025 in Amsterdam, The Netherlands, sharing insights on advanced React patterns, scalable architectures, and the future of frontend development.

title: TheGeekConf Berlin
description: At TheGeekConf Berlin (July 2024, Berlin, Germany), Shayan shared insights on building scalable React and React Native products, focusing on real-world engineering challenges and intuitive UX design. The talk highlighted practical strategies for leading teams and delivering production-grade applications.

title: Talent500 React-n-Roll
description: At Talent500 React-n-Roll (March 2024, Bengaluru, India), Shayan discussed modern React development, team leadership, and the importance of developer experience in building robust applications.

title: FOSS United
description: At FOSS United (December 2023, Bengaluru, India), Shayan presented on open source contributions, community-driven development, and the impact of collaborative engineering on the tech ecosystem.

title: React India 2023
description: At React India 2023 (October 2023, Goa Velha, India), Shayan discussed advanced patterns in React and shared his experience as a founding engineer, emphasizing the importance of developer experience and maintainable codebases in large-scale projects.

title: React Bangalore
description: At React Bangalore (June 2023, Bengaluru, India), Shayan shared practical tips for React developers, focusing on performance optimization and real-world use cases from his work at Zenduty.

title: GeekyAnts
description: During his session at GeekyAnts (May 2023, Bengaluru, India), Shayan discussed the future of React Native and cross-platform development, highlighting best practices and lessons learned from leading engineering teams.

title: RV Institute of Technology Protatva 2023
description: At RV Institute of Technology Protatva 2023 (April 2023, Bengaluru, India), Shayan delivered a session on modern web development and the future of frontend engineering.

title: New Horizon College of Engineering (Oct 2022)
description: At New Horizon College of Engineering (October 2022, Bengaluru, India), Shayan spoke about JavaScript, React, and the evolving landscape of frontend technologies.

title: New Horizon College of Engineering (Apr 2022)
description: At New Horizon College of Engineering (April 2022, Bengaluru, India), Shayan presented on TypeScript, React Native, and building scalable applications.

title: RV Institute of Technology
description: At RV Institute of Technology (April 2022, Bengaluru, India), Shayan discussed the importance of UX in modern web and mobile applications.

title: PES University
description: At PES University (February 2020, Bengaluru, India), Shayan gave a talk on Machine Learning, AR/VR, and the intersection of emerging technologies with modern product development.
